title: SamHacker's Command GUI
description:
A command gui easier than Forge's World Handler and it runned on Fabric...

By MCreator
body:
# SamHacker's Command GUI

## **描述：**  
這是一款參考Forge平台的World Handler模組設計的Minecraft指令GUI版的輔助模組。它為有權限的玩家提供了一個方便的GUI介面，用於快速執行各種指令，從而豐富和便捷他們的遊戲體驗。

**Fabric 版本正在開發**，未來我應該會結束 Forge 版開發，轉而朝向 Fabric


## **特色：**  
- 快速開啟GUI介面以執行指令（預設為按下按鍵 R）
- 適用於單人世界和伺服器
- 需要對應指令的權限

## **使用方式：**  
1. 下載並安裝本模組。
2. 在遊戲中按下快捷鍵 R 來開啟GUI介面。
3. 在介面中選擇並執行所需的指令。

## **注意事項：**  
- 適用於Minecraft Forge模組。
- 使用本模組需要相應的指令權限，例如傳送指令需要擁有TP權限。

## **意見與反饋：**  
歡迎提供任何意見或反饋，讓我們不斷改進和完善本模組。

## **Forge版的最後一個版本**
本模組已著手開發Fabric版，我還在開發中！

這是本模組第一個版本，也就是Forge版的模組的Git原始碼存儲庫位置：[https://github.com/510208/scg-mod-forge](https://github.com/510208/scg-mod-forge)

---

# SamHacker's Command GUI

## **Description:**  
SamHacker's Command GUI is an auxiliary mod for Minecraft, designed as a GUI version of Minecraft commands, referencing the design of the World Handler mod on the Forge platform. It provides players with a convenient GUI interface, accessible via shortcut key (default is pressing the R key), for quickly executing various commands to enrich and streamline their gaming experience.

**The Fabric version is working in progress(WIP)**. In the future, I should end the development of the Forge version and switch to Fabric.

## **Features:**  
- Quickly open GUI interface to execute commands (default shortcut key is R)
- Suitable for single-player worlds and servers
- Requires corresponding command permissions

## **How to Use:**  
1. Download and install the mod.
2. Press the shortcut key R in-game to open the GUI interface.
3. Select and execute the desired command in the interface.

## **Notes:**  
- Compatible with Minecraft Forge mods.
- Using this mod requires appropriate command permissions, for example, teleportation commands require TP permission.

## **Feedback:**  
Feel free to provide any feedback or suggestions to help us continually improve and enhance the mod.

## **Last version of Forge version**
This module has started to develop the Fabric version, and I am still developing it!

This is the first version of this module. The Git source code repository location of the AndForge version of the module: [https://github.com/510208/scg-mod-forge](https://github.com/510208/scg-mod-forge)
